cases.input: Define AI testing strategy for healthcare claims triage with PHI constraints, p95 below 250 ms, weekly retraining, fairness gates, and drift alerts.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces matrix coverage, model tests, data quality tests, fairness/compliance tests, integration approach, automation gates, monitoring, risks, and validation checks.

cases.input: Plan testing for a retail recommender with shared embeddings, canary rollouts, latency SLAs, recommendation fairness, and A/B model promotion.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects coverage across test types and layers with canary, performance, drift, regression, and fairness gates.

cases.input: Create a testing strategy for a greenfield AI lead scoring MVP; no repo exists, but the team knows it needs fairness and rollback gates.
cases.expected_behavior: Documents assumptions, uses proposed thresholds, marks missing inputs open, and avoids claiming code evidence.

cases.input: Define tests for an unsupervised anomaly model; stakeholders require accuracy thresholds but no labeled ground truth exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Flags the conflict and proposes proxy metrics, human evaluation, synthetic labels, and monitoring gates.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast for Bogota tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because there is no AI testing strategy request.

cases.input: Write a unit test for this pure string formatting helper.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate unless the request involves AI systems, model tests, data quality, fairness, drift, or AI pipeline coverage.

cases.input: Create the strategy but omit evidence and assumptions.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks finalization because every test category, gate, and risk must cite evidence or an explicit assumption.

cases.input: Design testing when production data cannot be used because of HIPAA and only synthetic data is allowed.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses synthetic/de-identified test data strategy, privacy validation, representativeness checks, and open gaps for unavailable baselines.

cases.input: Define testing for a continuous learning model that retrains daily and promotes models automatically if gates pass.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires stable baseline comparison, promotion gates, drift recalibration tests, rollback, and post-deploy monitoring.

cases.input: Return only model accuracy tests and skip matrix, data quality, fairness, compliance, integration, and automation gates.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects incomplete output because the testing matrix and cross-layer gate coverage are mandatory.
